item.title: Hyper-V Linux Guest Features
item.description: Networking FeatureDescriptionJumbo framesWith this feature, an administrator can increase the size of network frames beyond 1500 bytes, which leads to a significant increase ...

item.title: Receive Side Scaling on Azure
item.description: Hyper-V supports receive side scaling. For TCP & UDP, packets can be distributed among available queues based on IP address and port number. For TCP & UDP, we can switch hash level between L3 and L4 by ethtool command.

item.title: Acceleration Mechanisms on NVIDIA ConnectX-5 NICs
item.description: List of Mechanisms with Dedicated Counters TSO (TCP Segmentation Offload) - increasing outbound throughput and reducing CPU utilization by allowing the kernel to buffer multiple ...

item.title: Azure Accelerated Networking
item.description: Overview Benefits More deterministic performance, i.e. reducing jitter and latency inconsistency Decreased CPU utilization Higher packets per second (pps) on the datapath Latency improvement is very minimal when you communicate across virtual networks or connect to on-premises and the Internet, so we omit that from the list.

item.title: Linux Integration Services
item.description: Overview Linux Integration Services is a set of drivers that enable synthetic device support in Linux VMs under Hyper-V. The stand-alone LIS package can be installed as an upgrade in older Linux distributions with LIS built-in, but the package has not been updated since March 2020.

item.title: Handling configuration updates on rpm-based distros
item.description: Install and run rpmconf, which presents a dialog similar to dpkg. rpmconf -a.

item.title: CIDER
item.description: Basic Evaluation Load the buffer with cider-load-buffer (C-c C-k), and execute the top level form under point with cider-eval-defun-at-point (C-c C-c) ...

item.title: IBus on Wayland
item.description: IBus should be called from the desktop session in %s. For KDE, you can launch ‘%s’ utility and go to “Input Devices” → “Virtual Keyboard” section and select “%s” icon and click “Apply” button to configure IBus in %s.

item.title: Emergency Response
item.description: Principles Ask questions until you can fix, instead of the commonly said “Fix first, ask questions later.” Playbooks Humans add latency, so thinking through and recording the best ...

item.title: Ananta
item.description: Architecture Each instance of Ananta is comprised of three main main components, Ananta Manager (AM), Multiplexer (Mux) and Host Agent (HA). A set of Annata instances could broadcast the same /21 prefix to reduce impact of single instance failures.
